Footer.tagline: An independent boutique studio building fast, custom websites for founders anywhere. Fixed scope. Fixed pricing. Shipped in a week.

metadata.title: Pricing & Packages
metadata.description: Three packages. One standard. Starter CHF 1,500 · Business CHF 3,500 · Pro from CHF 7,500. Pages, process, design level and live references — priced upfront.
metadata.ogDescription: Three packages. One standard. Priced up front, with live client references.

Hero.body: Every site is hand-built and custom-designed. The tiers differ in scope and depth, not quality.

starter.bestForLong: A focused brochure site that converts — one well-crafted funnel, nothing that looks cheap, nothing you don't need.
starter.pageNote: Up to 4 pages. Add more for CHF 150 each.
starter.designDescription: A light brand system — deliberate palette, one display + one body font, spacing scale, mobile-first. Clean and modular, not templated.

services.name: Services
services.description: What you offer, one clear block each

business.bestForLong: The sweet spot for most Swiss SMEs. A real brand system, editable content, SEO that ranks, animation that carries meaning — not decoration.
business.pageNote: Up to 6 pages. Structure tuned to your business.
business.designDescription: A full brand system — custom palette, type-pairing, spacing and motion tokens. Scroll-driven reveals and micro-interactions that match the industry.

extras.cms: Sanity CMS — edit text, images, team, blog
extras.openGraph: Open Graph + Twitter cards on every page

reference.note: Single-page with anchor nav, Sanity CMS, founders module, Resend contact, bilingual-ready.

pro.bestForLong: When off-the-shelf stops scaling. Custom design direction, multi-language, real integrations (Supabase, Stripe, booking, CRM), production e-commerce, retainer-ready.
pro.pageNote: Scope defined during the discovery phase.
pro.designDescription: A custom design direction — we research your industry and propose a design system that is yours alone. Bespoke motion, typography hand-picked, not a template that works.

multilingual.name: Multilingual
multilingual.description: DE + EN standard, more as add-on

reference.note: Supabase auth + Stripe Connect escrow, preview gate, listings CRUD, transactional email, cron payout webhook, Pro-Shop industrial design.

Extras.heading: Extras
Extras.lead: Everything priced up front. No "contact us for a quote" games.

copywriting.name: Copywriting
copywriting.description: One page of copy — research, draft, two revisions.

extraPage.name: Extra page
extraPage.description: Add a page to Starter or Business — designed, built, in style.

extraRevision.name: Extra revision round
extraRevision.description: A full batch of feedback, implemented in one pass.

logo.name: Logo design · basic
logo.description: Typographic mark + monogram by our sister studio Aariviiva.

multilingual.name: Multilingual
multilingual.description: Translation setup + routing. Starting at DE + EN.

Maintenance.heading: Hosting & maintenance
Maintenance.lead: Month to month. Cancel with 30 days notice. You keep the code regardless. We bill in CHF, VAT excluded.

q1.q: What do I need to provide before you start building?
q1.a: We need your text content, images or photos, logo, and brand colours. If you don't have these, we offer copywriting and basic logo design as add-ons.

q2.q: What counts as a revision round?
q2.a: One batch of written feedback, collected and implemented in one pass. Additional rounds are CHF 200 each.

q3.q: Do you offer ongoing support after launch?
q3.a: We include a 7-day bug-fix window after launch. For ongoing support, maintenance retainers start at CHF 149/month.

q4.q: What if my project needs more than 4 or 6 pages?
q4.a: Extra pages are CHF 150 each. Larger projects are quoted under the Pro package.

q5.a: 50% upfront before we start. 50% before the site goes live. Domain and hosting are transferred after full payment.

q6.a: The clock starts when we receive your content and deposit. Most Starter sites are live within 4 business days.

ServicesPage.ctaSubtext: Fill out the brief wizard — we'll get back within 24 hours with a written proposal and Swiss Werkvertrag.
